newsSince: No new material company-specific news since June 9. The data-center cooling thrust (second AI Factory air-cooled reference design guide May 5, NVIDIA collaboration, FY26 EPS guide to $4.70 with ~11% backlog growth) all predates June 9 and was already embedded in the prior hold.

sources.label: JCI second data center reference design guide (PRNewswire, May 5)
Data center cooling drives JCI growth (Facilities Dive)

verdicts.rankRationale: Master under-owned-bottleneck list: liquid-cooling/grid/switchgear exposure intact and the record-backlog quarter plus AI Factory design guides were already in the hold. No fresh Jun 9-23 catalyst; -2.7% drift is noise. Bottleneck thesis increasingly recognized, capping residual alpha at this rank.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Data-center thermal management ramp (AI Factory guides, NVIDIA collab)
verdicts.primaryRisk: Cooling/controls story now well-understood; PT only ~5% above spot
verdicts.bull: Scarce gigawatt-scale data-center cooling and grid/electrical exposure; backlog +11%, FY26 EPS raised to $4.70.
verdicts.neutral: High-quality bottleneck name but the AI-cooling re-rating is largely priced; +17.5% YTD.
verdicts.bear: Mean PT only ~5% above spot; cyclical building-controls demand and execution risk on cooling rollout.
